CustomField.description: The reason of the Payee Deduction. For wage overpayments, this reason will be shown in the Employee Community when reviewing wage overpayment deductions for approval.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The reason of the Payee Deduction. For wage overpayments, this reason will be shown in the Employee Community when reviewing wage overpayment deductions for approval.
CustomField.label: Deduction Reason
